where.if: AND (c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR t.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR cr.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))

mapper.sql: FROM course_schedule cs LEFT JOIN course c ON cs.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON cs.teacher_id = t.id LEFT JOIN classroom cr ON cs.classroom_id = cr.id LEFT JOIN sys_section_time ss ON cs.start_section_id = ss.id LEFT JOIN sys_section_time se ON cs.end_section_id = se.id
mapper.select:
SELECT cs.id, cs.academic_year AS academicYear, cs.semester,
cs.course_id AS courseId, c.course_no AS courseNo, c.name AS courseName,
cs.teacher_id AS teacherId, t.emp_no AS teacherEmpNo, t.name AS teacherName,
cs.classroom_id AS classroomId, cr.room_no AS classroomNo, cr.name AS classroomName,
cs.weekday,
cs.start_section_id AS startSectionId, ss.section_no AS startSectionNo, ss.section_name AS startSectionName, ss.start_time AS startSectionTime,
cs.end_section_id AS endSectionId, se.section_no AS endSectionNo, se.section_name AS endSectionName, se.end_time AS endSectionTime,
cs.start_week AS startWeek, cs.end_week AS endWeek, cs.week_type AS weekType,
cs.student_count AS studentCount, cs.remark, cs.status, cs.created_at AS createdAt, cs.updated_at AS updatedAt
ORDER BY cs.created_at DESC LIMIT #{query.size} OFFSET #{query.offset}

SELECT cs.id, c.name AS courseName, t.name AS teacherName, cr.name AS classroomName, cs.weekday, ss.section_no AS startSectionNo, se.section_no AS endSectionNo, cs.start_week AS startWeek, cs.end_week AS endWeek, cs.week_type AS weekType, cs.remark FROM course_schedule cs LEFT JOIN course c ON cs.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON cs.teacher_id = t.id LEFT JOIN classroom cr ON cs.classroom_id = cr.id LEFT JOIN sys_section_time ss ON cs.start_section_id = ss.id LEFT JOIN sys_section_time se ON cs.end_section_id = se.id WHERE cs.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND cs.academic_year = #{academicYear} AND cs.semester = #{semester} AND cs.weekday = #{weekday} AND GREATEST(ss.section_no, #{startSectionNo}) <= LEAST(se.section_no, #{endSectionNo}) AND GREATEST(cs.start_week, #{startWeek}) <= LEAST(cs.end_week, #{endWeek}) AND NOT (cs.week_type = 1 AND #{weekType} = 2) AND NOT (cs.week_type = 2 AND #{weekType} = 1)
AND cs.id != #{excludeId}

SELECT cs.id, c.name AS courseName, t.name AS teacherName, cr.name AS classroomName, cs.weekday, ss.section_no AS startSectionNo, se.section_no AS endSectionNo, cs.start_week AS startWeek, cs.end_week AS endWeek, cs.week_type AS weekType, cs.remark FROM course_schedule cs LEFT JOIN course c ON cs.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON cs.teacher_id = t.id LEFT JOIN classroom cr ON cs.classroom_id = cr.id LEFT JOIN sys_section_time ss ON cs.start_section_id = ss.id LEFT JOIN sys_section_time se ON cs.end_section_id = se.id WHERE cs.classroom_id = #{classroomId} AND cs.academic_year = #{academicYear} AND cs.semester = #{semester} AND cs.weekday = #{weekday} AND GREATEST(ss.section_no, #{startSectionNo}) <= LEAST(se.section_no, #{endSectionNo}) AND GREATEST(cs.start_week, #{startWeek}) <= LEAST(cs.end_week, #{endWeek}) AND NOT (cs.week_type = 1 AND #{weekType} = 2) AND NOT (cs.week_type = 2 AND #{weekType} = 1)
AND cs.id != #{excludeId}

SELECT cs.id AS scheduleId, cs.academic_year AS academicYear, cs.semester AS semester, cs.course_id AS courseId, c.name AS courseName, cs.teacher_id AS teacherId, t.name AS teacherName, cs.classroom_id AS classroomId, cr.name AS classroomName, cs.weekday AS weekday, cs.start_section_id AS startSectionId, ss.section_no AS startSectionNo, ss.start_time AS startSectionTime, cs.end_section_id AS endSectionId, se.section_no AS endSectionNo, se.end_time AS endSectionTime, cs.start_week AS startWeek, cs.end_week AS endWeek, cs.week_type AS weekType, cs.student_count AS studentCount, cs.remark AS remark FROM course_schedule cs LEFT JOIN course c ON cs.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON cs.teacher_id = t.id LEFT JOIN classroom cr ON cs.classroom_id = cr.id LEFT JOIN sys_section_time ss ON cs.start_section_id = ss.id LEFT JOIN sys_section_time se ON cs.end_section_id = se.id WHERE cs.id = #{scheduleId}
